description: Which installed plugins are appropriate for each worker-kind. Used by claude-session wrapper to build per-session --plugin-dir bundles. Keys match TASK.md frontmatter `kind:` field. Extend without fear — unknown kinds fall through to 'default'.

composer.purpose: User + assistant — strategy, triage, architecture discussion. Does not edit code directly.

orchestrator.purpose: Decomposes requests into TASK.md files, routes them to workers by kind.

frontend-ui.purpose: Vue components, pages, widgets, FSD refactors.

frontend-research.purpose: UX flows, user research synthesis, design handoff specs.

backend-api.purpose: Nitro API handlers, thin-controllers, shared contracts.

backend-module.purpose: DDD-lite modules under server/modules/**, repository + service layer.

db-migration.purpose: Drizzle schema split, server/db/schema/**, generated SQL review.

default.purpose: Fallback when no kind is set in TASK.md frontmatter.
